already_in_use.title: You are already logged into another session
already_in_use.description: Click “Use here” to use chat in this session

cart.title: Cart
cart.empty_description: Add items to your cart by accessing the available products list

voice_mode.title: Voice mode
voice_mode.listening: I'm listening, how can I help you?
voice_mode.microphoneHint: The microphone is on, you can speak whenever you're ready.
voice_mode.microphonePermissionHint: Enable microphone in your browser settings to use voice mode
voice_mode.check_microphone_browser_settings: Check your browser settings to enable the microphone.
voice_mode.microphone_disabled_in_browser: The microphone is currently disabled in your browser.

MICROPHONE_PERMISSION_DENIED.suggestion: Please allow microphone access in your browser settings

MICROPHONE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Please connect a microphone and try again

BROWSER_NOT_SUPPORTED.message: Your browser does not support voice mode
BROWSER_NOT_SUPPORTED.suggestion: Please use Chrome, Firefox, Safari or Edge

STT_CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Could not connect to the speech recognition service
STT_CONNECTION_FAILED.suggestion: Check your connection and try again

STT_AUTH_FAILED.suggestion: Check the API key and plan permissions

TTS_CONNECTION_FAILED.message: Could not connect to the text-to-speech service
TTS_CONNECTION_FAILED.suggestion: Check your connection and try again

TTS_GENERATION_FAILED.suggestion: The response will be shown as text

RATE_LIMITED.suggestion: Please wait a moment and try again

SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT.suggestion: Say something to start a new session

preview.title: Preview only
preview.input_placeholder: Preview mode, test will be available soon
